subject: A Super Saiyan warrior with upright golden spiky hair, muscular build, and an open orange-and-blue gi, surrounded by crackling golden energy, charging forward in a combat stance.
suspected_ip: Son Goku (Super Saiyan) — Dragon Ball franchise
description: A Super Saiyan warrior dominates the frame from roughly mid-torso up in a low-angle composition that emphasizes power and forward momentum. The figure has the iconic upright spiky golden hair of the Super Saiyan transformation. They wear an orange-and-blue martial arts gi that is partially open at the torso. Golden crackling energy radiates outward in all directions, creating a blazing aura that fills the background. The figure's expression is intense and focused, jaw set, eyes forward. The overall palette is overwhelmingly golden and yellow-orange.
foreground: Super Saiyan warrior in orange-and-blue gi, fists raised, golden aura blazing
background: Blazing golden energy field, white-hot center radiating outward
emotion: Intense, focused rage — combat-ready, unwavering forward stare
